name: Sora

name: Rebecca
description: Rebecca is an edgerunner of Night City, and is described as a short, spunky, trigger-happy solo who is always fighting with her brother [Pilar](https://anilist.co/character/284162/Pilar). The two siblings often team up with [Maine](https://anilist.co/character/284159/Maine) and his crew to conduct mercenary jobs.
